content: Zera Multi-Agent Orchestration: Uses Omniroute combos to select model tiers (premium, balanced, efficient) based on task complexity (C1-C5). Logic in configs/orchestrator/.
Memory Layered Retriever: Implements 4-layer memory (session, project, workspace, user). Uses BM25 for ranking. Default paths in .agent/memory/.
AGENTS Core: Zero Law - Production or Nothing. Architectural integrity, premium by default, zero chaos. Level 1 in the knowledge hierarchy.
Hermes Configuration: Models defined in models.yaml. Profiles in ~/.hermes/profiles/. Skill wiki path /Users/user/wiki.
